subcodes.first_line: O Concourse on High! Hearken unto that which hath been raised from the luminous Earth. By God! The Most Great Remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ملا الاعلی ان استمعوا ما ارتفع من الارض النورآء تالله ان الذکر الاعظم
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @power of the Manifestation of God, @proclamation to people of the Bayan
